[2018-04-15 12:59] darkeisbein: Thermite Nest: 12 :Gold: :Red: :Red: (supply 4)
2:Health: :Blocker: :Prompt:
When this unit is bought construct two prompt nitrocybes
Start of turn: construct a prompt nitrocybe
:Click: Sacrifice 3 nitrocybes, construct 4 prompt Nitrocybes (the sacrificed nitrocybes don't do any damage from their own sacrifice Ability)
[2018-04-15 12:59] darkeisbein: Suggestion for the encouraging gambit thing
[2018-04-15 12:59] darkeisbein: you get cybes but you don't want to use them because holding on to them means you can click this for more value
[2018-04-15 13:04] darkeisbein: also you always have the option to save cybes by saccing the value generating machine
[2018-04-15 13:12] darkeisbein: I just noticed a problem with that unit 😄  , it's absorb in red
[2018-04-15 13:13] darkeisbein: but I guess that can be fixed by putting blue into the cost?
[2018-04-15 13:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): red gets 1 absorb. no more
[2018-04-15 13:13] darkeisbein: yeah but creating cybes is essentially absorb
[2018-04-15 13:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): its not technically absorb 😛
[2018-04-15 13:14] darkeisbein: I know, it's better :NotLikeThis:
[2018-04-15 13:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): blood phage is absorb because you can make gold with it and buy engis :Lul:
[2018-04-15 13:15] darkeisbein: I kinda do want to see a stalemate where both players get 4 of these though
[2018-04-15 13:15] darkeisbein: because it's an extreme version of opposing cybe piles
[2018-04-15 13:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): but you can just see an endo+centurion+protoplasm game if you want that
[2018-04-15 13:16] masn6811 (Masne98888): do you know why proto is so good against endo in a cent mirror?
[2018-04-15 13:16] masn6811 (Masne98888): in a cent mirror, you can't afford to get breached
[2018-04-15 13:16] masn6811 (Masne98888): but proto both attacks and defends at the same time in that situation
[2018-04-15 13:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): compare that to a normal game where you have to choose between the 4 :Fragile: or the 4 :Attack:
[2018-04-15 13:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): in that case, you effectively get BOTH

--- Thread (48 messages, 2018-04-15) ---
[2018-04-15 15:55] .bky_1556 (bky): Harja Marshal (11GGG, 4 supply) 7 :Fragile:
Start of turn: gain 2 Attack
:Click: Sacrifice 3 :Drone: and gain 2 attack
[2018-04-15 15:56] .bky_1556 (bky): Potential challenge entry.
[2018-04-15 15:56] .bky_1556 (bky): What's wrong with the ability?
[2018-04-15 16:01] .bky_1556 (bky): Good, exactly as designed.
[2018-04-15 16:01] darkeisbein: the ability isn't bad
[2018-04-15 16:01] darkeisbein: like yeah it's really inefficient
[2018-04-15 16:01] darkeisbein: but if it allows you to kill two tarsiers it's probably slightly efficient
[2018-04-15 16:01] darkeisbein: if it allows you to kill a cynestra it's realy efficient
[2018-04-15 16:02] darkeisbein: if it allows you to kill a centurion it's really efficient
[2018-04-15 16:02] .bky_1556 (bky): Yeah, it looks like it's too good vs. tarsiers and I should nerf it.
[2018-04-15 16:03] darkeisbein: I mean 3 drones less means you might have a harder time defending next turn
[2018-04-15 16:03] darkeisbein: although this is good for bp transitions
[2018-04-15 16:03] darkeisbein: it's in a different color and bp ... very similar to drake true
[2018-04-15 16:04] darkeisbein: also I don't think it's to strong
[2018-04-15 16:04] .bky_1556 (bky): Standard is 4.6 gold ~= 2 prompt defense right?
[2018-04-15 16:04] .bky_1556 (bky): So it should sac 4 drones.
[2018-04-15 16:04] darkeisbein: like compared to drake this is worse outside of bp situations
[2018-04-15 16:04] darkeisbein: it probably should be slightly good when killing tarsiers?
[2018-04-15 16:04] .bky_1556 (bky): It's also cheaper than drake.
[2018-04-15 16:04] .bky_1556 (bky): It still is slightly good, by the ~.6 gold.
[2018-04-15 16:05] darkeisbein: like if anything make it cost some drones + some :Green:
[2018-04-15 16:05] .bky_1556 (bky): Yeah, I'd considered that but posted the more elegant version.
[2018-04-15 16:06] darkeisbein: but I think overall balance of the unit is fine
[2018-04-15 16:06] .bky_1556 (bky): Unlike Drake, you don't click it to kill drones.
[2018-04-15 16:06] .bky_1556 (bky): Not your opponent's, anyway.
[2018-04-15 16:06] darkeisbein: if you are transitioning into bp
[2018-04-15 16:06] darkeisbein: and your opponent isn't
[2018-04-15 16:06] darkeisbein: it might still be a worthwhile trade
[2018-04-15 16:08] .bky_1556 (bky): Not outside of extreme high inflation, which usually doesn't happen in breachproof.
[2018-04-15 16:08] .bky_1556 (bky): Doesn't even happen in semi-breachproof where drones are the breach target.
[2018-04-15 16:09] .bky_1556 (bky): One recent lesson I've learned about breachproof is that the opponent breaching drones isn't nearly as bad as it feels.
[2018-04-15 16:09] darkeisbein: I mean if you are getting breached next turn it means you can sell of your drones
[2018-04-15 16:10] .bky_1556 (bky): Ok, say I click two of these and my opponent kills one.
[2018-04-15 16:10] .bky_1556 (bky): My opponent loses 4 drones.
[2018-04-15 16:10] .bky_1556 (bky): Or I don't click them and my opponent kills 6 drones.
[2018-04-15 16:10] .bky_1556 (bky): And pings one of these for 1.
[2018-04-15 16:11] .bky_1556 (bky): In which case am I better off?
[2018-04-15 16:12] darkeisbein: prolly the latter one
[2018-04-15 16:12] darkeisbein: unless the 4 drone kills mean your opponent doesn't hit an important breakpoint
[2018-04-15 16:12] .bky_1556 (bky): Now, I'd click one of these to deny Tia.
[2018-04-15 16:13] darkeisbein: like if not killing drones means your opponent get's a really nice breakpoint on your bp stuff that probably means clicking this is bad
[2018-04-15 16:15] .bky_1556 (bky): We're still on level 1, though. It seems worthwhile, barely, to click this to kill wall+drone.
[2018-04-15 16:15] .bky_1556 (bky): Going from no-breach to breach.
[2018-04-15 16:16] .bky_1556 (bky): For larger absorbers, it gets increasingly worthwhile until the opponent actually wants to overdefend to keep a single click from breaching - this probably happens at Infusion Grid.
[2018-04-15 16:17] .bky_1556 (bky): Then the Harja player grabs a second.
[2018-04-15 16:17] .bky_1556 (bky): Clicking two of these is crippling, but it also represents a lot of denied absorb.
[2018-04-15 16:19] .bky_1556 (bky): So I think a sort-of gambit equilibrium results with the non-Harja player respecting only some of the clicks, depending on how large their absorber is.
[2018-04-15 16:22] .bky_1556 (bky): Because the clicks that *aren't* breaching can be made horribly inefficient by defending the threat, but the defender has an incentive to spend things on non-defense.

--- Thread (43 messages, 2018-04-16) ---
[2018-04-16 00:43] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): ...Enemy may ramp up damage at the expense of defense. Dangerous to use on 3-4R sets.
[2018-04-16 00:49] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Ok for the gambit challenge I figured I'd make a blocker instead of an attacker/freezer.  The idea being that you can afford to get breached and lose your best absorber because you'll get some health back next turn.  It was tough to make it feel like it didn't overlap with Infusion/Matrix/Grid, but here is my current version:
Ceramic Wall (6 :Gold: :Blue: :Blue: , 1 Supply) 5 :Health: 
:Time: 2, :Blocker: 
When Ceramic Wall is destroyed, construct an Infusion Grid.
(1.1) Changed to "When Ceramic Wall is destroyed, construct a Doomed Wall with :Exhaust: 1" (can't block on the same phase that Ceramic Wall dies and lifespan doesn't tick down until next turn)
[2018-04-16 00:49] f300xen (f0x): infusion grid isn't strictly worse than ceramic wall though
[2018-04-16 00:52] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Yeah, but I wanted it to create a blocker with >3 hp, 6->5 seemed like it was too good as soak if there was another large absorber.  Making up an unclickable version of infusion grid also seemed overcomplicated
[2018-04-16 00:54] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): also, tbh, you should check my unit.
[2018-04-16 00:55] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): otherwise this place feels toxic.
[2018-04-16 00:56] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): If something were to give a prompt unit when it died, would you expect to be able to use that unit on the same defense phase?  I assumed not, but didn't want it to be confusing.
[2018-04-16 00:57] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): and you expect feedback, smh.
[2018-04-16 00:57] f300xen (f0x): i would definitely not expect to be able to use the unit
[2018-04-16 00:58] f300xen (f0x): because you are merely assigning the damage, the damage does not happen until you confirm
[2018-04-16 00:59] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): then there's suddenly more block.
[2018-04-16 01:00] .bky_1556 (bky): "If something were to give a prompt unit when it died, would you expect to be able to use that unit on the same defense phase?" -> Last time I had that come up in a design, I solved it by having the created unit be chilled.
[2018-04-16 01:05] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Yeah, I didn't know it bt1, exhaust, chilled, or "not prompt" conveyed that or if they made it seem like it also couldn't block on your next turn.  Units die before start of turn updates to unit statuses, so it was clear to me at least.
[2018-04-16 01:09] 1000mh (Henry): @StrShPlyr You are free to post your unit designs here and others are free to discuss them if they so choose. That's it. No less, no more.
[2018-04-16 01:11] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): I shouldn't care, but this is toxic.
[2018-04-16 01:12] 1000mh (Henry): If you want to discuss this more, move over to #general_chat. I'd rather leave this channel for discussions on unit and game design c:
[2018-04-16 01:13] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): So, how much is R or RR on GR games?
[2018-04-16 01:18] .bky_1556 (bky): 1.1 wording is fine. The freeze solution doesn't work for doomed wall.
[2018-04-16 01:19] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Exhaust is used for Valkyrion.
[2018-04-16 01:26] kaelii: Blastoplast (4 :Gold: :Blue: :Red: , 10 supply) 3 :Health: 
:Blocker: :Time: 2
:Click: Sacrifice Blastoplast, 2 :Chill: , 2 :Attack:, Construct a :Time: 1 Nitrocybe
[2018-04-16 01:27] kaelii: 4 gold might be a tad cheap, I'm really bad at costing things.
[2018-04-16 01:28] f300xen (f0x): idk how inflation works so i can't help you with that
[2018-04-16 01:28] kaelii: Might also be too good at defense for super nitrocybe.
[2018-04-16 01:28] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): So our comparison would be 1 bite+2 cybes
[2018-04-16 01:29] kaelii: Far less effective at killing off a stack of itself compared to cybes, but has more threat than health
[2018-04-16 01:29] f300xen (f0x): i think it seems incredibly weak but idk
[2018-04-16 01:29] f300xen (f0x): since blue is worth a lot
[2018-04-16 01:30] f300xen (f0x): you don't eventually run out of things to spend blue on
[2018-04-16 01:30] kaelii: Yeah, the blue cost is the steep part.
[2018-04-16 01:31] kaelii: I hesitate about dropping the gold cost more though
[2018-04-16 01:31] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Yeah, I could see 4BR being slightly overcosted, but 3BR is almost certainly undercosted
[2018-04-16 01:32] kaelii: I mean, it's also probably decent to use it as a slow build wall if you can find the space because it has threat.
[2018-04-16 01:32] kaelii: As it could be a sunk red and cheaper wall if you're doing something primarily green on 3 color
[2018-04-16 01:34] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I don't think you want to sac it on defense, mainly for stacking threat and denying lifespan purchases
[2018-04-16 01:35] kaelii: Hard to really get one early enough to absorb on it though.
[2018-04-16 01:35] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): 2B for XX cybe, 2R for rest.
[2018-04-16 01:37] kaelii: In general the tradeoff is B<->RR for Absorb Option<->1 :Chill: and timing granularity
[2018-04-16 01:38] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): much worse chill but better HP.
[2018-04-16 01:40] kaelii: So it might even be possible to slightly buff the sac effect given that blue is fairly expensive and granularity of chill/attack usage is still something valuable to be giving up.
[2018-04-16 01:42] .bky_1556 (bky): At 4BR BT2 it's very inefficient soak.
[2018-04-16 01:44] .bky_1556 (bky): In the absence of further commentary I put Harja Marshal into the Reddit thread.
[2018-04-16 01:53] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I like that the threat is really painful to execute.
[2018-04-16 02:01] kaelii: My temptation is to try and work an extra damage of some sort into blastoplast's sacrifice. Adding a fastbuild nitrocybe is... Maybe acceptable?

[2018-04-17 11:10] .jrkirby (jrkirby): The click ability is usually a bad idea to use, otherwise you'd click it every time, it would be too much stronger than 2 normal drones, and it wouldn't be very interesting. But with a comparatively weak click ability, this is usually equivalent to buying 2 drones, except you have the opportunity to be impatient so you can make critical purchases. Many players will misuse this ability and put themselves at a disadvantage.
